/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pong_cpu_vga_sim.dir/src/pong_cpu_vga_sim.cpp.o -o pong_cpu_vga_sim   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib
